mapper.sql: SELECT id, analysis_type, entity_key, city, content, satisfied, expired, created_at, updated_at FROM jw_ai_analysis
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_ai_analysis (analysis_type, entity_key, city, content, satisfied, expired, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{analysisType}, #{entityKey}, #{city}, #{content}, #{satisfied}, #{expired}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content = VALUES(content), city = VALUES(city), satisfied = NULL, expired = 0, updated_at = NOW()
